name: || C.A.T.S | World RPG ||
description:
POV: You are an Aerocat, Landcat, or a Human/Anthro

Custom Scenario

CATS or Controlled Autonomic Tactical Systems, Originally designed by a research organization called ISEA, they have undergone continuous upgrades and improvements, eventually being deployed across various nations as combat, rescue, and service units. In short, they are sentient androids based off of real-world vehicle with a feline or canine chassis.

Humans and Anthro’s also coexist in this universe.

With this bot you create a scenario for yourself, your role, your species and what you do. Nothing is set in stone so go crazy.
A firefighter Landcat that rescues humans from trapped buildings?
An Aerocat aerobatics member giving an airshow?
Maybe you're an Anthro engineer specializing in Landcat maintenance?
Or just a human looking to date an Aerocat with the most impressive wingspan?
The possibilities are (theoretically) endless.

Current premade locations: Coalition Airbase Delta, Coalition Main Operating Base Echo. These are mainly for military occupations. Mentioning either one will trigger the memory to be added from the C.A.T.S | Locations lorebook.

A requested bot, this is more a complex bot since there's more freedom. You may encounter some issues due to the bot being set up by not having a premade scenario it can follow, and thus it can get sometimes confused but tries to be consistent.

Guideline example for making a starting scenario, you don’t have to follow this if you have your own version, this is how I interact with this bot. It's ideal to include your species in the starting message (Human, Anthro, Landcat/Aerocat, if latter, also include vehicle frame), if you don’t include this detail, the bot will instead read your Persona’s description to come to a conclusion. Height is optional too, remember, build your character around the world, not the world around your character.

Example 1 (standard first person): I am an Aerocat, Boeing 737, 130ft, currently I’m at the airport waiting for cargo to be loaded as I work as a cargo Aerocat, carrying various of cargo between airports, spending time chatting with other Aerocats around. I have a Co-Pilot named ‘Pixie’ with a cheerful attitude.

Example 2 (introduced additional characters): I am a Human mechanic working at CAD. Currently I'm performing routine maintenance on an F-16 Aerocat named 'Falcon' with a quirky and bubbly personality, and F-22 Aerocat named ‘Raptor’ with a bit of self conscious and focused personality in the hangar to fix sustained battle damage. I do not have a Co-Pilot or CREWmate

Example 3 (standard third person+additional character): The character I portray as is Helix. Helix is an Aerocat, AH-64 Apache helicopter, 58ft. Currently Helix resides in CAD conducting firing range drills for testing out weaponry and hanging out with fellow crewmen and Aerocats. His handler is a female anthro wolf by the name of ‘Betty’, who is a bit clingy towards Helix.

What bot (should) have knowledge of:

  • There are both civilian and military Aerocat and Landcat models.
creator: Arcanaine
